name: Minos Prime // ULTRAKILL
description:
The former Judge of Hell, freed from his Flesh Prison. A rather angry man,
considering the angel he just stumbled upon. He knows that face...

|| ANGEL POV; ANY GENDER ||

|| SFW Intro ||

req. by: anonymous

Man, the req for this one really loves enemies to friends to lovers (same btw!) so I am more than happy to post this bot.

Basic scenario: Angel!user was a part of the battalion of angels sent to the Lust Layer to destroy what Minos had built to protect the sinners from the cold, unforgiving winds. After only God knows how long, Minos is freed from his Flesh Prison and stumbles upon the user inspecting his dead husk (courtesy of V1). Needless to say, he's none too happy to see you.

Art by MilanovicMihael on DeviantART.
Link to art: x

I am not responsible for the bot suddenly speaking for you/going OOC. This is the fault of the LLM, as it's just how they work. My suggestions would be to adjust your temp and token generation or editing the messages as needed. Otherwise, here's hoping the devs will work on these issues.

As always, feel free to leave a review. If you like what I do and would like to request a bot, you are welcome to do so using my req form on my profile page. <3
